The controversy has now deepened further amid allegations that schools and educators were later informally encouraged to publicly defend the OSM system as criticism intensified nationwide.

description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah has resigned, paving the way for Deputy CM D.K. Shivakumar to take the top post. This transition follows months of speculation and high-level meetings in Delhi.  Photos showcasing unity between the leaders were shared, signaling an amicable power handover after the Congress high command's directive for a leadership change.

4 of family, including former sarpanch, burnt alive inside vehicle in Ajmer
description: Tragedy struck Ajmer's Shrirampura village as four family members, including a former sarpanch and his wife, perished in a vehicle fire. While initially appearing accidental, police now suspect foul play, citing injury marks and bloodstains at the residence. The investigation is focusing on the former sarpanch's family dynamics.

US arsenal depleted? Restocking THAAD, Tomahawk & Patriot missiles could take years
description: A recent Iran conflict has significantly depleted US high-end missile stockpiles, raising alarms in Washington. Critical systems like Tomahawks and Patriots may take years to replenish, creating a 'window of vulnerability' amid rising tensions with China. Production bottlenecks and allied demands complicate rebuilding efforts, impacting future defense readiness.

title: 'My biggest discovery was that ...': Quote of the day by Viola Davis
description: Viola Davis, the illustrious Oscar-winning actress, shares her transformative journey in the memoir 'Finding Me.' She candidly discusses how life's obstacles can serve as stepping stones to redefine who we are. By reflecting on her past struggles, she illustrates that strength emerges from adversity, fostering resilience and a profound capacity for love.

Twisha death probe: CBI arrests mother-in-law Giribala Singh after HC scraps anticipatory bail
description: The CBI has taken Giribala Singh, mother-in-law of deceased Twisha Sharma, into custody after the Madhya Pradesh High Court quashed her anticipatory bail. The court cited insufficient appreciation of evidence, including witness statements and WhatsApp chats, and noted her alleged lack of cooperation with the investigation into dowry harassment and cruelty allegations.

JP Morgan responds to order to pay $4M to ex-employee fired over home business meeting
description: A Wall Street arbitration panel has ordered JP Morgan to pay former employee Ryan Bodner $4 million in damages, plus interest, for wrongful termination. Bodner was fired over an expense submission for a business meeting at his home, which the bank allegedly mischaracterized as a party. The panel also recommended expunging the reason for his termination from his record.

title: 20 years in jail, Rs 34cr blood money: Kerala man on Saudi death row returns home on Bakrid
description: After two decades in a Saudi prison, Feroke native Abdul Rahim returned home on Eid Al Adha, a moment of immense joy for his family and the Malayali community. A massive crowdfunding effort raised Rs 47 crore, including Rs 34 crore in blood money, to secure his release from a death sentence and subsequent 20-year imprisonment.

Tendulkar explains Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s 'outstanding' batting aspect
description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s sensational 97 off 29 balls against SRH in the IPL 2026 Eliminator earned praise from cricket legends worldwide. The 15-year-old RR batter smashed 12 sixes and broke Chris Gayle’s record for most sixes in an IPL season. Sachin Tendulkar, Yuvraj Singh, AB de Villiers, Michael Vaughan and others hailed the teenager’s fearless batting as Rajasthan Royals reached Qualifier 2.

Chef Pankaj Bhadouria reveals diagnosed with breast cancer; fans pray for recovery
description: Pankaj Bhadouria, the trailblazing winner of MasterChef India, has publicly announced her breast cancer diagnosis. In an emotional message shared across social platforms, she urged her devoted followers to keep her in their thoughts and prayers as she navigates this challenging chapter.

Sooryavanshi tipped to hit '100 sixes' in an IPL season after shattering Gayle's record
description: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has rewritten IPL history, smashing Chris Gayle's record for most sixes in a season with 65. His explosive 97 off 29 balls propelled Rajasthan Royals to Qualifier 2. Commentator Aakash Chopra lauded his power and maturity, predicting he could one day reach an astonishing 100 sixes in a single IPL season.

Four lines that 'layoff email' from Meta Leadership has for those on H-1B visa
description: Meta has initiated another round of significant layoffs, impacting nearly 8,000 employees globally, with notifications starting in Singapore. While many are let go, over 7,000 will transition to AI initiatives. The company is providing immigration guidance and severance packages, including 16 weeks' pay plus two weeks per service year, and 18 months of COBRA coverage for affected staff.
